main.title: Extracurricular Activities
main.description: Manage and track extracurricular activities for students and sessions.

empty_state.title: No data to display
empty_state.subtitle: Select a classroom, session and week on the left to load extracurricular records.

no_data_state.title: No extracurricular records
no_data_state.subtitle: No records found for this session and week.

error_state.title: Failed to load extracurriculars
error_state.subtitle: Something went wrong. Please try again.

filters.title: Filters
filters.subtitle: Select a classroom, session and week to load extracurriculars.

edit_dialog.title: Edit Extracurriculars
edit_dialog.description: Update the extracurricular status and add notes for week {{week}}.

create_dialog.title: Create new extracurricular
create_dialog.description: Add a new extracurricular session to your school

dialog.title: Edit extracurricular
dialog.description: Update the details of the extracurricular session
